business information: This document outlines key information for NK Psychological Services, focusing on business operations, clinical services, technical details, and high-intent advertising strategies.
Company Address: 329 W 18th St, Suite 820, Chicago, IL 60616 (Pilsen/South Loop area)
Company Hours of Operation: Not Specified
Emily – Executive Director Email: Emily@nkpsych.comPrimary point of contact for emergencies and decision-making only. Do not CC on routine communications.
Antonia Teague – Operations Manager Email: Antonia@nkpsych.comPrimary contact for day-to-day tasks, information requests, and routine communications.
Our Email to Use: advertisingreportcard@gmail.comCC: me@advertisingreportcard.comCC: chris@moonraker.ai
industry & services: Industry: Mental Health and Psychological Services
Primary Services to Increase Business: ADHD Testing & Diagnostic Assessments Autism Diagnostic Clarity Neuropsychological Assessments EMDR Therapy (Trauma-informed)
Supplemental Clinical Services: Individual Therapy (Adults, Teens, and Children) Couples/Relational Therapy Family Therapy
Professional Services: Individual and group clinical case consultation for therapists Organizational and Identity/Relational Dynamics consultation
Seeking diagnostic clarity for neurodivergent profiles (ADHD/Autism) to address school, work, or medical requirements.
Achieving healing from trauma, loss, and PTSD through specialized modalities like EMDR.
Navigating life transitions and relational dynamics related to race, culture, and gender.

Unique Selling Proposition (USP) NK Psych utilizes a "consultation-centered" model, where a collaborative team of therapists regularly reviews cases to ensure a holistic view of the client's life, rather than the isolated approach of solo practices.
Psychodynamic approach focusing on unconscious processes and relational dynamics.
Deep expertise in clinician development, training doctoral and master’s level practitioners.
Commitment to neuro-affirming and trauma-informed care.
Peak Season: Not Specified Off-Peak Season: Not Specified
